items.title: Software Developer
items.description: Developing scalable features using React, TypeScript, and Tailwind. Architected robust backend solutions using Spring Boot, Node.js, and PostgreSQL.

items.title: AWS & ML Certifications
items.description: Completed AWS Cloud Technical Essentials and Kaggle Intermediate Machine Learning to build foundational knowledge in cloud systems and predictive models.

items.title: National Hackathons & CTFs
items.description: Won 1st Runner-Up at BioFusion, 2nd Runner-Up at Zero-Day CTF, 4th Runner-Up at Colombo Mini Hackathon, and competed as a finalist in IEEE OCTWAVE 2.0.

items.title: BSc (Hons) in Information Technology
items.description: Undergraduate student. GPA: 3.44 / 4.00. Focus areas include Data Structures, Object-Oriented Programming, Database Systems, and Web Technologies.

items.title: G.C.E. Advanced Level
items.description: Completed Advanced Level in the Physical Science Stream. Achieved A grade in Combined Mathematics, and B grades in Chemistry and Physics.
